title: PR Recipient Registry
description: Canonical list of GitHub logins eligible to be assigned to PRs and pinged by @pr-notifier / @pr-reminder.

default_reminder_interval_hours.description: Fallback reminder cadence when a recipient does not override.

default_assignee.description: If true, this login is auto-assigned to every PR this subsystem opens.

opt_out.description: If true, skip all notifications and reminders for this login.

reminder_interval_hours.description: Per-recipient reminder cadence override; otherwise default_reminder_interval_hours applies.

notifications_confirmed.description: Operator-confirmed that this login receives GitHub notifications (web/mobile/email). Workflow emits a step-summary warning when false.
